entity.label: Jeiel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the chief Levites, who made an offering for the restoration of the Passover by Josiah (2 Chr. 35:9).

nodes.label: Jeiel
nodes.description: One of the chief Levites, who made an offering for the restoration of the Passover by Josiah (2 Chr. 35:9).

verses.text: Conaniah also, and Shemaiah and Nethaneel, his brethren, and Hashabiah and Jeiel and Jozabad, chief of the Levites, gave unto the Levites for passover offerings five thousand small cattle, and five hundred oxen.
